narrative:
Precinct Rootstown B (precinct in Portage County) has 914 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.2%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.4 percentage points.
